goal: Add a pure request/response contract for a future PR receipt file loader, requiring POST, confirm phrase, path match, and ready BPK-038 decision while still returning fileReadAllowed:false and reading no files.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, change workflows, change package files, or mutate external state.
claims: File loader request shape can be contracted without reading files.
Even ready contract responses remain fileReadAllowed:false.
Path mismatch and method are guarded.
assumptions: A later contract would implement actual file read after this contract.
dod: Ready contract, method guard, and path mismatch are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, workflow changes, package changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-038 decided future file loader eligibility. BPK-042 may define request/response contract without reading files.
